title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
